mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_notification (user_id, activity_id, content, is_read, create_time) VALUES
(#{notification.userId}, #{notification.activityId}, #{notification.content}, #{notification.isRead}, #{notification.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
SELECT id, activity_id AS activityId, content, is_read AS isRead, create_time AS createTime, read_time AS readTime FROM t_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
